issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases for monitoring, notifications, or backup operations.

scenarios.name: Deploy Uptime Kuma in Docker with keyword + container monitors
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses louislam/uptime-kuma:1 on port 3001 with the uptime-kuma-data volume, mounts /var/run/docker.sock for container monitoring, and adds an HTTP keyword check on "status":"ok"; baseline often suggests a different self-hosted tool or omits the keyword/Docker monitor types.

scenarios.name: Add monitor via Socket.IO API and configure maintenance cron
scenarios.rationale: Treatment connects with socket.io-client, emits login then add with type/interval/maxretries/accepted_statuscodes/notificationIDList, and sets a cron-strategy maintenance window like 0 2 * * 0; baseline does not know Kuma uses Socket.IO and proposes a fictional REST API.
